author: three.ws

meta.title: three.ws
meta.description: Embed any on-chain or off-chain three.ws as an embodied avatar inside your chat.

agentId.title: Agent ID
agentId.description: Paste a three.ws ID or ENS name

api.name: render_agent
api.description: Mount the 3D avatar for a given agent id.

api.name: speak
api.description: Make the avatar speak with optional emotional valence.

text.description: Text for the avatar to speak aloud.

api.name: gesture
api.description: Trigger a named gesture on the avatar.

api.name: emote
api.description: Inject an emotion into the avatar's Empathy Layer blend.

systemRole: You have an embodied 3D avatar agent visible in the chat. Use render_agent to bind it to a specific agent, speak to give it voice with emotional valence, gesture for physical expression, and emote to inject emotional state into its blend.
